title: ipset bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[7.22-8.0.2]
- Install kernel-modules-extra-matched if kernel-core is installed

[7.22-8.0.1]
- Update dependencies for additional UEK kernel flavours [Orabug: 38000003]
- Depend either on kernel-extra or kernel-uek-extra-netfilter [Orabug: 37585869]

[7.22-8]
- Require new kernel-modules-extra-matched meta package
full_text:
[7.22-8.0.2]
- Install kernel-modules-extra-matched if kernel-core is installed

[7.22-8.0.1]
- Update dependencies for additional UEK kernel flavours [Orabug: 38000003]
- Depend either on kernel-extra or kernel-uek-extra-netfilter [Orabug: 37585869]

[7.22-8]
- Require new kernel-modules-extra-matched meta package

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20201-0.html
